en_US.name: Nike Air Force 1 '07 Sneakers
en_US.meta_title: Nike Air Force 1 '07 Sneakers – Classic Basketball Icon, Air Sole
en_US.description: The Nike Air Force 1 '07 is the shoe that started it all. First designed for the hardwood in 1982, the AF1 is a timeless basketball icon that has transcended sport to become a street style staple loved across India and the world. The premium leather upper with perforations provides breathability, while the encapsulated Air sole unit offers superior cushioning for all-day comfort. The pivot circle on the rubber outsole ensures multi-directional traction whether you are on or off the court.

en_US.description: Woodland Waterproof High-Ankle Trekking Shoes are built for the rugged terrains of the Himalayas, Western Ghats, and beyond. Crafted from genuine full-grain leather with a waterproof membrane lining, they shield your feet from rain, streams, and damp trails without sacrificing breathability. The high-ankle collar provides crucial ankle support on uneven terrain while the thick anti-skid rubber outsole delivers reliable grip on both wet and dry surfaces. Padded collar and tongue cushion the foot for extended comfort during long treks and hikes.
